mapper.select: SELECT cg.CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME AS codeGroupName, cg.CODE_GROUP_DESC AS codeGroupDesc, cg.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, cg.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, cg.BIZ_GROUP_ID AS bizGroupId FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP cg WHERE cg.CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_CODE_GROUP ( CODE_GROUP_ID, CODE_GROUP_NAME, CODE_GROUP_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, BIZ_GROUP_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.codeGroupId}, #{dto.codeGroupName}, #{dto.codeGroupDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.bizGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_CODE_GROUP SET CODE_GROUP_NAME = #{dto.codeGroupName}, CODE_GROUP_DESC = #{dto.codeGroupDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId}, BIZ_GROUP_ID = #{dto.bizGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP WHERE CODE_GROUP_NAME = #{codeGroupName}
mapper.sql: cg.CODE_GROUP_ID, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME, cg.CODE_GROUP_DESC, cg.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, cg.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, cg.BIZ_GROUP_ID
mapper.select: SELECT cg.CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME AS codeGroupName, cg.CODE_GROUP_DESC AS codeGroupDesc, cg.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, cg.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, cg.BIZ_GROUP_ID AS bizGroupId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CODE c WHERE c.CODE_GROUP_ID = cg.CODE_GROUP_ID) AS codeCount FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP cg ORDER BY cg.CODE_GROUP_ID

SELECT cg.CODE_GROUP_ID, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME, cg.CODE_GROUP_DESC, cg.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, cg.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, cg.BIZ_GROUP_ID, c.CODE_GROUP_ID AS C_CODE_GROUP_ID, c.CODE, c.CODE_NAME, c.CODE_DESC, c.SORT_ORDER, c.USE_YN, c.CODE_ENGNAME, c.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS C_LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, c.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS C_LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP cg LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE c ON cg.CODE_GROUP_ID = c.CODE_GROUP_ID WHERE cg.CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER

SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, CODE_GROUP_NAME AS codeGroupName, CODE_GROUP_DESC AS codeGroupDesc, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, BIZ_GROUP_ID AS bizGroupId FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP WHERE BIZ_GROUP_ID = #{bizGroupId} ORDER BY CODE_GROUP_ID

SELECT cg.CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME AS codeGroupName, cg.CODE_GROUP_DESC AS codeGroupDesc, cg.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, cg.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, cg.BIZ_GROUP_ID AS bizGroupId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CODE c WHERE c.CODE_GROUP_ID = cg.CODE_GROUP_ID) AS codeCount FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP cg
ORDER BY cg.CODE_GROUP_ID ORDER BY cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME ORDER BY codeCount ORDER BY cg.CODE_GROUP_DESC ORDER BY cg.CODE_GROUP_ID
DESC ASC
ORDER BY cg.CODE_GROUP_ID
